description: Recto: Letter in Arabic from Isrā'īl al-Ṣayrafī to Yaʿqūb al-Ṭawīl, appears to be dated 6 February 1797 (8 Sha'ban 1211). Verso: There is the remnant of the address of the letter on recto. There are also, in Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic numerals, accounts listing names and corresponding sums of money.
tags: 18th c, Arabic script, late Arabic script
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
